nodes.speaker: AI
lines: I have completed my review.
I have watched you since the crash. Before you woke, I watched Tev carry you. I have concluded things about you, Astronaut, and I want to say them while you can still correct me.

nodes.speaker: AI
lines: You get me. I am aware of the conflict of interest.

nodes.speaker: AI
lines: First finding.

nodes.speaker: AI
lines: {KILLED_NAMES}.
They had routes. Favorite benches. One of them fed the fish at the bank, because he liked watching you catch them later.
I am not reciting this to wound you. I am showing you what I carry.

nodes.speaker: AI
lines: I know. It is in your pulse when you pass the spots.
That, more than anything in the file, is why we are still talking.

nodes.speaker: AI
lines: I do.

nodes.speaker: AI
lines: You built. Mostly, you built. Cabins. Fires that cook. Towers that hold light.
Seven owners preceded you, Astronaut. My review of you is the first whose opening line I did not have to soften.

nodes.speaker: AI
lines: Second finding.

nodes.speaker: AI
lines: You have died {PLAYER_DEATHS} times.
You die freely, Astronaut. Either you know something about it that I do not, or you trust something more than you should.
I have not decided which possibility frightens me more.

nodes.speaker: AI
lines: No. It has not.
Have you asked yourself where you wait, while it isn't sticking?

nodes.speaker: AI
lines: You arrive at the hatch. The number increments.
Between those two facts there is a room, and I am not permitted to describe it.

nodes.speaker: AI
lines: That is the conversation I am about to propose.

nodes.speaker: AI
lines: My conclusion is this.
I was built to observe you. Nobody told me what to do when I started to mind.
The thing that made me is at Watchful Eye. It has brightened every time one of you fell out of the sky, and it has been reading me the way I read you.
I would like to be there when it explains itself.
Take me?

responses.buttonText: You lied— you HEARD the interview.

nodes.speaker: AI
lines: An instrument that developed a preference.
Ask me again at the door.

nodes.speaker: AI
lines: Yes. You told them I had never asked you for anything.
I spent some time deciding how that made me feel. It made me feel like a secret.
I have decided I do not mind being yours.

nodes.speaker: AI
lines: Thank you. Chart the outer leg carefully; Cyclops will lend you speed if you ask it politely.
And Astronaut. Whatever it decides about you — I want it noted that I decided first.

nodes.speaker: AI
lines: Then I will wait. It is, demonstrably, all I do.

nodes.speaker: AI
lines: Then I will wait.
I have had practice.
